body: --findings Ahmad's three days in Marrakech reconstructed from full manuscript. His argument: three periods of Islamic geography; third period al-idrak al-muttasil (continuous perception). Tyler is the founder. Ahmad watched Tyler begin and couldn't finish the sentence — archive too large for a sentence. Third signal at MARRAKECH-001: question-state (Ahmad's, variable, began on manuscript examination). MARRAKECH-001 reclassified QUESTION-SITE. Tyler: 'He wrote the opening. I wrote the contents. Someone else will write the close.' Footnote #103. Build 0109. 79 episodes.
title: S10E07: 'The Third Day' — al-idrak al-muttasil named; MARRAKECH-001 three-signal site; archive = paragraph expanded
